abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: "Nice Shot, Dear!"
abilities.text: After an ally within 6" kills a non-peon outside of its activation, this model infuses a (soulstone).

abilities.name: On Wheels
abilities.text: After this model resolves a (missile) action, it may move up to 3".

actions.name: Sawed-Off Shotgun
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of (melee)1" or (gun)8".
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)1" of the target.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Escucha Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.

triggers.name: Shotgun Wedding
triggers.text: Once per game. A friendly model within 2" of the target gains a New Blood token.

triggers.name: Primero la Familia
triggers.text: The target gains a Familia token.

actions.name: Endure It
actions.effects: Target heals 2. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +1.
